creator: brnrd@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Maxim Filimonov from comment #0)

Hi Maxim,

Did you check the diff on the commit that broke this feature? Basically it's a whole new port, no stone (line) has been left unturned (unmodified). That's how this feature broke.

I'm sorry we broke this, but the port really needed a big overhaul. We'll get this fixed asap.

Cheers, Bernard.
